name: Potential Turla Recon Activity
notes: This rule detects a common Turla activity which executes several reconnaissance commands to discover about the victim machine and also to move across laterally.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Common Reconnaissance Commands
when at least 5 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 24 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 24 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY Potential Turla Recon Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Common Reconnaissance Commands
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 24 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: Potential Turla Recon Activity
Event description: Detects a common Turla activity which executes several reconnaissance commands to discover about the victim machine and also to move across laterally.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
